articles.title: UPSSSC Pharmacist answer key 2026 released at upsssc.gov.in: Direct link to download here
articles.summary: The UPSSSC has published the provisional answer key for the Pharmacist Recruitment Examination 2026 on its official website. Candidates who took the June 29 exam can review their responses, calculate tentative scores, and submit objections with valid academic references within the stipulated period.

articles.title: IGNOU extends July 2026 re-registration deadline: Check new schedule and direct link to register here
articles.summary: The Indira Gandhi National Open University (IGNOU) has extended the July 2026 re-registration deadline until July 15, allowing existing students more time to continue their academic programmes. The mandatory online process applies to eligible learners enrolled in undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma and certificate courses offered through both Open and Distance Learning (ODL) and online modes..

articles.title: ICAR AIEEA PG, AICE-JRF/SRF (PhD) 2026 admit cards released at exams.nta.nic.in/icar: Direct link to download hall tickets
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency has issued the admit cards for the ICAR AIEEA (PG) and AICE-JRF/SRF (PhD) 2026 examinations scheduled for July 4. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official ICAR examination portal using their login credentials.

articles.title: JEECUP counselling 2026: Round 1 seat allotment result out; direct link to download here
articles.summary: Uttar Pradesh Joint Entrance Examination Council has released the Round 1 seat allotment results for JEECUP Counselling 2026. Candidates can check their allocated college and course on the official website by logging in with their credentials.

articles.title: Angelina Jolie's best action movies: 'Lara Croft', 'Salt' and more
articles.summary: Before she became one of Hollywood's most celebrated dramatic actresses, Angelina Jolie was quietly redefining what a female action star could look and feel like on screen. Physically committed, effortlessly commanding, and capable of making even the most outlandish premise feel entirely believable, she built an action filmography that nobody else in her generation has come close to matching.
